docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $75.00) SERVED MAY-09-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, NELLY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-02-2011 - JUDGMENT.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE FILED BY SHOLL, DAVID LEE, NELLY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHOLL, DAVID RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEE, NELLY $4,820.28 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,945.28, PLAINTIFF MET BURDEN OF PROOF OF ESTABLISH ACCIDENT AND DAMAGES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, NELLY
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,820.28 FILED BY SHOLL, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, NELLY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-02-2011 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-02-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-02-2011 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
